nodes.label: AI as collaborative iterative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I go back and forth. I like to send an initial prompt, wait to see what I get back and then work with the AI to create something better.

nodes.label: AI as time-saving efficiency tool
nodes.grounding_span: it saves me so much time

nodes.label: AI as tool for routine administrative tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer handling the problem solving and also the very hyper-specific problems myself. If a parent has a complaint, or a student is hurt or affected by something, I handle that old fashion.

nodes.label: AI as personal productivity enhancer
nodes.grounding_span: I see AI as a tool more than competition. I dont think AI will immediately take over, but the people who utilize AI will take over.
